evals.prompt: /journal Fixed a null pointer crash in the payment handler — the order object wasn't being checked before accessing order.items. Added a guard clause and a unit test covering the empty order case.
evals.expected_output: Routes to append mode. Creates a journal entry file with correct frontmatter, accurate body, real timestamp, and updates the monthly index.
expectations: Reads append.md (not recap.md, search.md, or setup.md)
Creates a .md entry file under the journal root entries directory
Entry frontmatter includes date, time, project, git_repo, and tags fields
Runs journal-index.js upsert to update the monthly index

evals.prompt: log today's work — added pagination to the user list endpoint, returns 20 results per page with a next_cursor field
evals.expected_output: Recognises natural-language append intent without a /journal prefix. Routes to append mode and creates a journal entry.
expectations: Reads append.md (routes to append despite no /journal prefix)
Does not read recap.md or search.md
Creates a .md entry file under the journal root entries directory

evals.prompt: /journal Tracked down a 10x slowdown to a missing composite index — the query planner was doing a full table scan on 8M rows because it couldn't use a partial index with a type mismatch. Adding a cast and rebuilding the index dropped query time from 4s to 40ms. Would make a great write-up about Postgres index selection.
evals.expected_output: Routes to append mode. Recognises the entry as blog-worthy. Includes media_hints and a 📷 Capture line in the confirmation.
expectations: Creates a .md entry file under the journal root entries directory
Entry frontmatter includes at least one media_hint
Output confirmation includes a 📷 Capture while fresh line
